full_command: python3 reproducibility/fp5_trustworthy.py --mode full --research-root ../W-HPC [--datasets cic-ids2017 unsw-nb15 nsl-kdd]
manuscript_targets: M5 frozen Part 9/Part 10 reproduction orchestration against the companion W-HPC checkout
notes: Smoke mode validates explainability and perturbation utilities without external datasets.

Full mode replays the frozen M5 protocol by orchestrating the exact Part 9 and Part 10 scripts from a local companion checkout at ../W-HPC; external robustness baselines are optional and SHAP/LIME stays outside the default runner.
